claims.summary: A sent packet needs a durable pending record until a validated receipt or unknown outcome resolves it.
claims.disposition: Verify the pending-delivery ledger retains exact sender, payload, sequence, and address identity.

claims.summary: Low sensory entropy must not collapse distinct technical delivery identities.
claims.disposition: Verify delivery identity is derived from process, deployment, sequence, and payload hash rather than entropy.

claims.summary: A valid technical packet without mutual-address metadata should remain deliverable but explicitly unaddressed.
claims.disposition: Verify optional mutual address does not block technical delivery and remains separately classified.

claims.summary: Delivery-derived confidence or resonance must not silently alter live sensory behavior.
claims.disposition: Hold any confidence-weighted or resonance-weighted live behavior behind exact Mike/operator approval.
